name: has_ongoing_activation
title: PnP activation is present
description: Segment targets XBO accounts with PnP activation either in progress or completed

expressions.given:
minutes_before_now(facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.manualActivationTimestamp?0) < 10 ||
(
    is_null(facts.highlight_reel_ignite_post_activation.reelId) || 
    facts.highlight_reel_ignite_post_activation.timestamp < facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.timestamp
) &&
!is_null(facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.activationStatus) &&
hours_before_now(facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.timestamp?0) <= 48 &&
facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.status != "PENDING_ACTIVATION" &&
(
    (
        is_null(facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.errorCategory) &&
        is_null(facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.errorCode)
    ) ||
    (
        (
            facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.errorCategory == "DEVICE_NOT_FOUND_IN_BILLER" ||
            facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.errorCategory == "GENERAL_ELIGIBILITY_ERROR_NON_RETRYABLE" ||
            (
                (
                    facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.errorCategory == "DELINQUENCY_CHECK_FAILED" ||
                    facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.errorCategory == "DELINQUENCY_CHECK_FAILED_HARDDISCONNECT"
                ) &&
                (
                    facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.errorCode == "financialHealth_harddisconnect_disconnected" ||
                    facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.errorCode == "financialHealth_softdisconnect" ||
                    facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.errorCode == "financialHealth_exceededDelinquentDays" ||
                    facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.errorCode == "financialHealthCheckFailed"
                )
            ) ||
            (
                (
                    facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.errorCategory == "SERVICE_CHECK_FAILED" ||
                    facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.errorCategory == "NO_HSD_SERVICE"
                ) &&
                (
                    facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.errorCode == "accountNumberNotFound" ||
                    facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.errorCode == "noServicesFoundToActivate"
                )
            ) ||
            (
                (
                    facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.errorCategory == "GENERIC_ELIGIBILITY_ERROR" ||
                    facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.errorCategory == "GENERAL_ELIGIBILITY_ERROR"
                ) &&
                facts.xenia_pnp_gateway.errorCode == "accountBlackListed"
            )
        )
    )
)
